title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Gaurs Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Gaurs Group
jsonLd.description:
Gaurs Group has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Gaurs Group:
Gaurs Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gaurs Group!
